ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insecticides" (
  "insecticide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insecticide */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the insecticide */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., soil application, foliar spray) */,
  "formulation_type" TEXT /* Type of formulation (e.g., liquid, dry) */,
  "pounds_active_ingredient" REAL /* Pounds of active ingredient per acre */,
  "acres_treated_per_unit" REAL /* Number of acres treated by one unit of the formulation */,
  "phi_days" INTEGER /* Pre-Harvest Interval (PHI) in days */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or instructions */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number for the insecticide */,
  "active_ingredients" TEXT /* List of active ingredients */,
  "recommended_application_time" TEXT /* Recommended time for application (e.g., at planting, layby) */,
  "safety_precautions" TEXT /* Safety precautions for handling and applying the insecticide */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the insecticide */,
  "regulatory_status" TEXT /* Regulatory status (e.g., approved, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insecticide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "insecticide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insecticide being applied */,
  "amount_formulation_per_acre" REAL /* Amount of formulation needed per acre */,
  "acres_to_treat" REAL /* Total number of acres to treat */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of the application */,
  "application_rate" REAL /* Rate of application per acre */,
  "total_amount_used" REAL /* Total amount of formulation used */,
  "application_method_details" TEXT /* Detailed method of application (e.g., specific equipment used) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the application */,
  "application_cost" REAL /* Cost of the application */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the application */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field where the application was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_insecticide_id FOREIGN KEY ("insecticide_id") REFERENCES insecticides ("insecticide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formulations" (
  "formulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formulation */,
  "insecticide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insecticide this formulation is for */,
  "formulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the formulation (e.g., 2EC, 2SC) */,
  "unit_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the formulation (e.g., oz, pounds) */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the active ingredient in the formulation */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the formulation in days */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the formulation */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the formulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formulations_insecticide_id FOREIGN KEY ("insecticide_id") REFERENCES insecticides ("insecticide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of the crop */,
  "crop_season" TEXT /* Season during which the crop is grown */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field where the crop is grown */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the crop was planted */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Expected harvest date */,
  "estimated_yield" REAL /* Estimated yield of the crop */,
  "grower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grower who is growing the crop */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation used for the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop the insecticide is applied to */,
  "application_result" TEXT /* Result of the application (e.g., successful, partial control) */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field where the application was performed */,
  "grower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grower who performed the application */,
  "pest_detected" TEXT /* Type of pest detected */,
  "pest_population_density" INTEGER /* Population density of the pest */,
  "control_method" TEXT /* Method used to control the pest */,
  "follow_up_actions" TEXT /* Follow-up actions taken after the application */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score of the application (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_records_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_records_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
